forge-tsChangelogConceptsConfigurationContributingFAQGetting Started

Guides

Packages

Packages
gen
gen — API Referencegen — Examplesgen — Functionsgen — Types
PackagesGenApi

gen — Types

Type contracts for the gen package

Type contracts exported by this package: interfaces, type aliases, and enums.

GuideSource

The source heuristic that discovered a guide.

DiscoveredGuide

A guide discovered from the symbol graph by code analysis heuristics.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
slugstringYesURL-safe slug (e.g. "configuration", "error-handling").
titlestringYesHuman-readable title (e.g. "Configuration Guide").
descriptionstringYesShort description of the guide's content.
sourceGuideSourceYesWhich heuristic discovered this guide.
symbolsForgeSymbol[]YesThe symbols that contribute content to this guide.

MdText

Inline leaf node: literal text.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"text"YesNode discriminant — always "text".
valuestringYesThe raw text content.

MdInlineCode

Inline leaf node: code span.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"inlineCode"YesNode discriminant — always "inlineCode".
valuestringYesThe code span content (without surrounding backticks).

MdStrong

Inline container: strong emphasis (bold).

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"strong"YesNode discriminant — always "strong".
childrenMdPhrasing[]YesInline content rendered in bold.

MdEmphasis

Inline container: emphasis (italic).

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"emphasis"YesNode discriminant — always "emphasis".
childrenMdPhrasing[]YesInline content rendered in italic.

MdLink

Inline container: hyperlink.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"link"YesNode discriminant — always "link".
urlstringYesThe link destination URL.
childrenMdPhrasing[]YesInline content rendered as the link text.

MdPhrasing

Union of all inline (phrasing) content types.

MdHeading

Block node: heading (depth 1-6).

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"heading"YesNode discriminant — always "heading".
depth1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6YesHeading level: 1 for #, 2 for ##, up to 6 for ######.
childrenMdPhrasing[]YesInline content of the heading.

MdParagraph

Block node: paragraph.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"paragraph"YesNode discriminant — always "paragraph".
childrenMdPhrasing[]YesInline content of the paragraph.

MdCode

Block node: fenced code block.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"code"YesNode discriminant — always "code".
langstring | null | undefinedNoLanguage tag for syntax highlighting.
valuestringYesThe code content (without the fence delimiters).

MdBlockquote

Block node: blockquote.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"blockquote"YesNode discriminant — always "blockquote".
childrenMdBlock[]YesBlock-level content inside the quote.

MdHtml

Block node: raw HTML (including comments).

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"html"YesNode discriminant — always "html".
valuestringYesThe raw HTML string.

MdThematicBreak

Block node: horizontal rule.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"thematicBreak"YesNode discriminant — always "thematicBreak".

MdListItem

List item container.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"listItem"YesNode discriminant — always "listItem".
spreadboolean | undefinedNoWhether blank lines separate this item's children.
childrenMdBlock[]YesBlock-level content of the list item.

MdList

Block node: ordered or unordered list.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"list"YesNode discriminant — always "list".
orderedboolean | undefinedNotrue for numbered lists, false for bullet lists.
spreadboolean | undefinedNoWhether blank lines separate list items.
childrenMdListItem[]YesThe list items.

MdTableCell

GFM table cell.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"tableCell"YesNode discriminant — always "tableCell".
childrenMdPhrasing[]YesInline content of the cell.

MdTableRow

GFM table row.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"tableRow"YesNode discriminant — always "tableRow".
childrenMdTableCell[]YesCells in this row.

MdTable

GFM table.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"table"YesNode discriminant — always "table".
align("left" | "center" | "right" | null)[] | undefinedNoColumn alignment directives for each column.
childrenMdTableRow[]YesRows of the table (first row is the header).

MdBlock

Union of all block content types.

MdRoot

Document root.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"root"YesNode discriminant — always "root".
childrenMdBlock[]YesTop-level block content of the document.

FrontmatterResult

Result of parsing frontmatter from markdown/MDX content.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
bodystringYesThe body content without the frontmatter block.
dataRecord<string, unknown>YesThe parsed frontmatter data as a key-value map.

DocPage

A single generated documentation page.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
pathstringYesRelative path from outDir (e.g., "packages/core/index.md")
contentstringYesPage content (Markdown or MDX)
frontmatterRecord<string, string | number | boolean>YesFrontmatter fields
stubboolean | undefinedNoWhen true, this page is scaffolding intended for human/agent editing. Stub pages are created only on the first build and never overwritten, preserving manual edits across subsequent forge-ts build runs. Auto-generated pages (stub=false) are always regenerated from source.

SiteGeneratorOptions

Options controlling the doc site generator.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
format"markdown" | "mdx"YesOutput format
ssgTarget"docusaurus" | "mintlify" | "nextra" | "vitepress" | "fumadocs" | undefinedNoSSG target for frontmatter.
projectNamestringYesProject name
projectDescriptionstring | undefinedNoProject description.
repositoryUrlstring | undefinedNoRepository URL (auto-detected from package.json).
packageNamestring | undefinedNonpm package name for install commands.

SSGTarget

Supported SSG target identifiers.

GeneratedFile

A file to write to disk during scaffolding or generation.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
pathstringYesRelative path from the docs output directory.
contentstringYesFile content (string for text).
stubboolean | undefinedNoWhen true, this file is scaffolding intended for human/agent editing. Stub files are created only on the first build and never overwritten, preserving manual edits across subsequent forge-ts build runs. Callers should check this flag and skip writing if the file exists.

SSGStyleGuide

Style guide configuration for the SSG target.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
pageExtension"mdx" | "md"YesFile extension for doc pages.
supportsMdxbooleanYesWhether the target supports MDX components.
requiresFrontmatterbooleanYesWhether frontmatter is required on every page.
maxHeadingDepthnumberYesMaximum recommended heading depth.
defaultImportsstring[]YesComponent imports to add at top of MDX files (if supportsMdx).
codeBlockLanguage"typescript" | "ts" | "tsx"YesCode block language for TypeScript examples.

ScaffoldManifest

Scaffold manifest describing what init docs creates.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
targetSSGTargetYesThe SSG target this manifest is for.
filesGeneratedFile[]YesFiles that will be created.
dependenciesRecord<string, string>Yesnpm dependencies to install.
devDependenciesRecord<string, string>Yesnpm devDependencies to install.
scriptsRecord<string, string>YesScripts to add to package.json.
instructionsstring[]YesPost-scaffold instructions for the user.

AdapterContext

Context passed to adapter methods.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
configForgeConfigYesResolved forge-ts configuration.
projectNamestringYesProject name (from package.json or directory).
projectDescriptionstring | undefinedNoProject description.
pagesDocPage[]YesThe generated doc pages (from site-generator).
symbolsForgeSymbol[]YesAll symbols extracted from the project.
outDirstringYesOutput directory for generated docs.

DevServerCommand

Command to start a local dev server for doc preview.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
binstringYesThe binary to execute (e.g., "npx", "node").
argsstring[]YesArguments to pass to the binary.
cwdstringYesWorking directory to run from.
labelstringYesHuman-readable label for the command.
urlstringYesThe URL the dev server will be available at.

SSGAdapter

The central SSG adapter interface. Every doc platform provider implements this contract. One file per provider. No shared mutable state.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
targetSSGTargetYesUnique target identifier.
displayNamestringYesHuman-readable display name.
styleGuideSSGStyleGuideYesStyle guide for this platform.
scaffold(context: AdapterContext) => ScaffoldManifestYesGenerate the complete scaffold for a new doc site. Called by forge-ts init docs --target <name>. Returns all files, dependencies, and scripts needed.
transformPages(pages: DocPage[], context: AdapterContext) => GeneratedFile[]YesTransform generic DocPages into platform-specific pages. Adds correct frontmatter, component imports, file extensions. Called during forge-ts build.
generateConfig(context: AdapterContext) => GeneratedFile[]YesGenerate platform-specific configuration files. e.g., mint.json, sidebars.js, _meta.json, .vitepress/config.ts Called during forge-ts build.
getDevCommand(outDir: string) => DevServerCommandYesGet the command to start the local dev server for this platform. Called by forge-ts docs dev.
detectExisting(outDir: string) => Promise<boolean>YesCheck if a scaffold already exists in the output directory. Used for safety checks before init or target change.

CKMConcept

A domain concept extracted from the codebase.

CKMOperation

A user-facing operation extracted from the codebase.

CKMConstraint

An enforced constraint or validation rule extracted from the codebase.

CKMWorkflow

A multi-step workflow for achieving a common goal.

CKMConfigEntry

A single entry in the configuration schema.

CKMManifest

The top-level Codebase Knowledge Manifest (v2).

MarkdownOptions

Options controlling Markdown output.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
mdxboolean | undefinedNoWhether to use MDX syntax (default: Markdown).

ReadmeSyncOptions

Options controlling README sync behaviour.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
badgeboolean | undefinedNoInclude a "Documented with forge-ts" badge above the API table.
includeExamplesboolean | undefinedNoInclude first

SkillPackage

A generated skill package following the agentskills.io directory structure. Contains SKILL.md plus optional references and scripts files.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
directoryNamestringYesThe skill directory name (lowercase, hyphens only, max 64 chars).
files{ path: string; content: string; }[]YesFiles to write inside the skill directory.

SSGConfigFile

A single generated SSG configuration file.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
pathstringYesRelative path from outDir (e.g., "mint.json", "_meta.json")
contentstringYesFile content

GenerateOptions

Options for the generation pipeline.

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
forceStubsboolean | undefinedNoWhen true, overwrite stub pages even if they already exist on disk. Normally stub pages (concepts, guides, faq, contributing, changelog) are only created on the first build to preserve manual edits. Use this to reset stubs to their scaffolding state.

gen — Functions

Functions and classes for the gen package

On this page

GuideSourceDiscoveredGuideMdTextMdInlineCodeMdStrongMdEmphasisMdLinkMdPhrasingMdHeadingMdParagraphMdCodeMdBlockquoteMdHtmlMdThematicBreakMdListItemMdListMdTableCellMdTableRowMdTableMdBlockMdRootFrontmatterResultDocPageSiteGeneratorOptionsSSGTargetGeneratedFileSSGStyleGuideScaffoldManifestAdapterContextDevServerCommandSSGAdapterCKMConceptCKMOperationCKMConstraintCKMWorkflowCKMConfigEntryCKMManifestMarkdownOptionsReadmeSyncOptionsSkillPackageSSGConfigFileGenerateOptions
